_doc: Main Configuration File for Quickshell Settings

wallpaper._doc_startup_mode: Determines how the first wallpaper is chosen. Options: 'random' or 'first'.
wallpaper._doc_rotation_interval: How often the wallpaper automatically rotates to another random image. Set to 0 to disable rotation. In minutes.
wallpaper._doc_directory: Absolute path to the directory containing your wallpapers.

network._doc_interface: Network interface to monitor for stats. Leave empty to auto-detect.

weather._doc_weather: Latitude and longitude coordinates for fetching Open-Meteo weather data. Set to 0 for auto-detection.
weather._doc_polling: How often to poll the weather API in milliseconds (900000ms = 15 minutes).

polling._doc_polling: Background service update rates in milliseconds.

shell._doc_avatar: Path to the user's profile image (avatar).
shell._doc_font: Default font family for Quickshell UI.

animation._doc_animation: Animation duration timings across Quickshell in milliseconds. Lower is faster.

colors._doc_colors: Set use_hardcoded to true to bypass dynamic pywal/matugen colors from colors.json. If true, Quickshell will use the hardcoded hex values below.
